meta_title: For Freelancers: API integration guide to Solve can't finish projects (Intermediate Case Study)
meta_description: Learn how to API integration guide and overcome can't finish projects. A Intermediate-level Case Study using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: API Integration Guide: Finish SaaS Projects Faster
content.seo_description: Stop stalling on client projects. Master API integration with this intermediate guide using Antigravity and Claude Code to ship faster and impress clients.
content.answer_block: Stop building from scratch. By standardizing API integration using Antigravity for architecture and Claude Code for implementation, you eliminate the 'blank page' syndrome. This workflow automates boilerplate, enforces type safety, and allows you to ship production-ready endpoints in hours rather than days, ensuring you finish every project on time.
content.intro:
The graveyard of freelance careers is littered with 'almost finished' projects. You spend 80% of your time wrestling with authentication headers, rate-limiting logic, and brittle data parsing, leaving you exhausted before you even touch the core product value. The client is waiting, the scope is creeping, and your motivation is plummeting.

It doesn't have to be this way. The secret to velocity isn't working harder—it's weaponizing modern tooling to handle the heavy lifting. By integrating Antigravity for structural scaffolding and Claude Code for iterative refinement, you transform complex API integrations from a bottleneck into a repeatable, high-speed assembly line.

steps.title: Define the API Schema
steps.description: Before writing code, generate a strict OpenAPI spec to prevent integration drift and ensure type safety across your stack.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a comprehensive OpenAPI 3.0 schema for a RESTful API that handles user authentication, data retrieval, and error handling with strict type definitions.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Create a new schema.yaml file based on the generated OpenAPI spec and validate it.'

steps.title: Scaffold the Integration Layer
steps.description: Use Antigravity to generate the boilerplate client code, reducing manual setup time by 90%.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a robust API client wrapper using the provided schema. Include interceptors for logging and automatic token refresh.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Initialize the API client library in /src/lib/api and ensure all endpoints are exported.'

steps.title: Implement Robust Error Handling
steps.description: Handle real-world edge cases like 429 rate limits and 503 service outages before they reach the UI.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create an error-handling middleware that parses standard API error codes and maps them to user-friendly notifications.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Apply the error middleware to the base API client class and add unit tests for 401 and 500 error scenarios.'

steps.title: Automate Data Transformation
steps.description: Bridge the gap between raw API responses and your application's internal state using automated mapping functions.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate data transformer functions that map raw API JSON responses into TypeScript interfaces for the frontend.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Generate the transformation layer in /src/utils/transformers.ts and sync with the API models.'

steps.title: Final Integration Test
steps.description: Validate the entire flow from request to state update to ensure no regressions exist.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a suite of integration tests that verify the full request-response lifecycle for all authenticated endpoints.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Run integration tests and fix any failing assertions in the API client layer.'

pro_tips: Always use a dedicated API gateway pattern rather than calling services directly from components.
Implement request caching at the client level using React Query or SWR to reduce API load and improve perceived performance.
Use mock servers for development so you can keep building even when the third-party API is down.
Version your API client libraries internally to prevent breaking changes when the upstream API updates.
Inject a telemetry header in every request to track performance bottlenecks in production automatically.
content.next_steps: Now that your API layer is automated, shift your focus to building the UI components that consume these endpoints. Use your new setup to iterate on features weekly rather than monthly.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting incomplete projects drain your bank account and your confidence. By mastering this automated workflow, you reclaim your time and scale your freelance business to the next level. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
